name: subzero-md
description: A high-performance, multi-device WhatsApp automation bot built on Node.js, engineered for reliability, scalability, and advanced message handling. Developed by Mr Frank OFC, this bot supports session-based authentication, dynamic command execution, and optional database integrations for persistent data storage across MongoDB, PostgreSQL, or MySQL.

SESSION_ID.description: Secure authentication session string used to connect the bot to WhatsApp Web. This is required to initialize and maintain a persistent login without QR scanning.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Primary administrator WhatsApp number in international format (e.g. 263719647303). This number receives privileged access to bot commands and controls.

MONGO_URL.description: MongoDB connection URI for enabling persistent storage of bot data such as user sessions, logs, and configurations. Recommended for scalable deployments.

POSTGRES_URL.description: PostgreSQL database connection string for structured data storage. Ideal for relational data and advanced querying requirements.

MYSQL_URL.description: MySQL database connection URI for persistent structured storage. Useful for compatibility with existing MySQL-based systems.

BOT_NAME.description: Display name of the bot as seen in chats and command responses. Customize to match your branding or project identity.

BOT_OWNER.description: Display name of the bot owner or developer. This may appear in bot information, menus, or credits.

PREFIXES.description: Command trigger prefixes separated by commas (e.g. .,!,/). These define how users invoke bot commands.

PACKNAME.description: Default sticker pack name used when generating or sending stickers through the bot.

COMMAND_MODE.description: Operational mode of the bot. Use 'public' to allow all users access, or 'private' to restrict usage to the owner only.

TIMEZONE.description: System timezone used for scheduling, logs, and time-based features (e.g. Africa/Harare). Ensure accuracy for correct time handling.

REMOVEBG_KEY.description: API key from remove.bg service used to enable automatic background removal for images processed by the bot.
